name: Arcane Trickster
description: Some Rogues enhance their fine-honed skills of stealth and agility with spells, learning magical tricks to aid them in their trade. Some Arcane Tricksters use their talents as pickpockets and burglars, while others are pranksters.

3.Spellcasting: You have learned to cast spells. You know three cantrips: Mage Hand and two others of your choice from the Wizard spell list. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. You can use an Arcane Focus. When you reach Rogue level 10, you learn another Wizard cantrip of your choice.
3.Mage Hand Legerdemain: When you cast Mage Hand, you can cast it as a Bonus Action, and you can make the spectral hand Invisible. You can control the hand as a Bonus Action, and through it, you can make Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks.

9.Magical Ambush: If you have the Invisible condition when you cast a spell on a creature, it has Disadvantage on any saving throw it makes against the spell on the same turn.

13.Versatile Trickster: When you use the Trip option of Cunning Strike, you can also cause the effect on another creature within 5 feet of your spectral Mage Hand.

17.Spell Thief: When a creature casts a spell targeting you or including you in its area, you can use your Reaction to force the creature to make an Intelligence saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, you negate the spell's effect against you, and you steal the knowledge of the spell if it is at least level 1 and a level you can cast. For 8 hours, you have it prepared and the creature can't cast it. Once per Long Rest.
